description_long: This is a striking double-band ring featuring five prominent, faceted gemstones set in a row along the top. The gemstones are mounted in prong settings, each rising above the band to maximize their visibility and brilliance. The double-band design adds structural interest and a sense of luxury, while the symmetrical arrangement of the stones creates a balanced and elegant appearance. The metal appears dark, possibly blackened gold or platinum, providing a dramatic contrast to the sparkling stones. The overall silhouette is bold and architectural, with the gemstones forming a crown-like motif above the finger. This piece is both ornamental and statement-making, suitable for formal or high-fashion urban settings.
description: A double-band ring with five large, prong-set gemstones arranged in a crown-like row atop a dark metal base. The design is bold, architectural, and highly ornamental.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double bands and all five gemstones prominently set in a row.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the height of the gemstones above the bands and the prong settings.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the gemstones and double bands visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the vertical arrangement of the gemstones and the thickness of the bands.
